title: cyphostigma pulchellum
intro: Cyphostigma pulchellum, also known as the Blue Ginger or New Zealand Iris, is a flowering plant native to the mountains of New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Cyphostigma pulchellum include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and fight off infections. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, flu, and other respiratory issues.
